31029.postEvent: You become the town festival's must-invite 'jester,' though your swordsmanship is actually not bad.

31030.event: A magical flood pours a dead poet's poems into your mind, forcing sonnet speech and attracting suitors.
31030.postEvent: You swear that if you find that poet's grave, you will smash his tombstone to pieces.

31031.event: Encountering glowing jellyfish in a moonlit garden, you waltz to unheard music till dawn, then return home to understand birds' three-day quarrels.
31031.postEvent: The effect fades after three days, but you still miss the freedom of your feet leaving the ground that night.

31032.event: You receive a blank letter with only a wax teardrop imprint in the lower right corner.
31032.postEvent: Later, the well is filled, but every time you pass by, you hear a heartbeat coming from underground.

31033.event: You find an old lute; plucking it makes candle flames form a score, giving neighbors dreams of a silver ocean.
31033.postEvent: The next day, one string breaks. You hang the lute on the wall and never touch it again.

31034.event: Your shadow fights a stranger's; after chasing, it returns. You find coins stamped 'Mischief Fee'.
31034.postEvent: That passerby later becomes your drinking buddy; every time you meet, they first look at the ground.

31035.event: At mass, a pious knight falls asleep, drooling on the scripture 'Do not be drunk with wine'.
31035.postEvent: Afterwards, he insists that the Holy Spirit kissed his forehead in a dream, and no one disputes it.

31036.event: At a seance tea party, a teacup reveals a widow's yesterday self; they argue and overturn the table.
31036.postEvent: As you leave, you hear her mutter that perhaps chaos is the ultimate order.

31037.event: Stepping on a faded magic circle turns your beard to dandelions, which recovers but grows faster.
31037.postEvent: Now you have to pay double wages to the barber every month.

31038.event: In a drinking contest, a dragonborn spits flame, singeing your hat. He teaches slang that frosts ale.
31038.postEvent: With this trick, you earn the nickname 'Iced Brew Master' in mercenary circles.

31039.event: A cursed owl claims to be your old sword instructor, demanding smoked meat or it reveals your secret.
31039.postEvent: You serve it for an entire season until it chases a golden moth into the depths of the forest.

31040.event: In the attic, an old book turns your heroic deeds into comical accidents, like a dragon's sneeze.
31040.postEvent: Unsure whether to laugh or cry, you donated it; it became a popular humorous biography at the library.

31041.event: A prophecy ring repeats 'You will eat next meal'. Thrown away, you go hungry; retrieved, it adds 'You will find.
31041.postEvent: Now you hang the ring by your bed as a warning against impulse spending.

31042.event: An alchemist's 'Youth Soap' makes your hands look 17 for three hours. An old comrade mistakes you for a ghost.
31042.postEvent: After reverting, the alchemist was gone, but that youthful experience made you gaze in the mirror ten extra minutes.

31043.event: A white horse claiming to be a cursed prince asks for a kiss; kissing it turns it into your old.
31043.postEvent: Later you heard it was a real curse, but you were supposed to kiss its front hoof.

31044.event: You pass a dwarf village where all hail you "Tall Savior", pick highest apple for harvest, and get never-moldy jam.
31044.postEvent: The jam was sweet, but when you returned, the village was rubble.

31045.event: While urinating, a breathing tree hollow sucks you into a vortex; you fall into an unfamiliar land and walk three.
31045.postEvent: Thus you learned the dialect of that foreign land and remain wary of all tree hollows.

31046.event: A baby dragon sneezes, blasting a mage onto a spire.
31046.postEvent: After that, you performed this trick at taverns and always earned a free mug of ale.

31047.event: A stew spirit criticizes pepper; you fix it, then can't eat other food. You die after tasting all cuisines.
31047.postEvent: People say this is the Gluttony God's final test; you are now His chef.

31048.event: Your cursed sword sang crude ditties, alerting goblins who chased you three streets in shame.
31048.postEvent: You gave the sword to a bard troupe; it now stars in Goblin Slayer.

31049.event: You found a northeast-pointing stone egg, followed it to a misty spring, and water spirits gave you curative water.
31049.postEvent: The spring water indeed stopped the creaking in your knees, but you could never find the hot spring again.

31050.event: A stray dog became a halfling thief; calling it 'ugly dog' thrice broke the curse, giving you a skeleton key.
31050.postEvent: Using that key, you accidentally opened the mayor's vault, then slammed it shut, never daring to touch it again.

31051.event: Your horse ate bad magical oats, charged backward laying eggs, you fell but dodged a thrust, winning by accident.
31051.postEvent: That horse was bought at a high price by a circus.

31052.event: You found a rune shield; now you must nap an hour daily or feel weak.
31052.postEvent: Your daily routine became regular, and you actually felt more energetic.

31053.event: Twelve wooden ducks with name letters march until you speak your tongue-twisting full name.
31053.postEvent: The next day, the ducks turned back into ordinary wooden carvings, and you never saw them move again.

31054.event: Your reflection lagged from a curse; say 'I know I am real' for 7 days. Eerie movements scared a child.
31054.postEvent: After recovery, you developed a habit of talking to yourself in the mirror, always feeling you were urging another self.

31055.event: Lost month's salary to a gambler who became you; you washed dishes for 30 days.
31055.postEvent: After a month, you saved enough to leave, but the owner insisted you were the best dishwasher.

31056.event: Your shadow made faces; you followed it to a bell tower, where mirror showed future you making strange gesture.

31057.event: Cat asked for a kiss to break a curse; after kissing, a princess appeared, then became a crow and left.

31058.event: Your warhorse suddenly spoke in knightly tongue, guided your impossible spinning thrust to victory, then demanded daily ale and apples.

31059.event: After a week trapped watching ghosts in an eternal-night manor, you perfectly sing the lost 'Moonlight Lament' but shiver afterward.
31059.postEvent: Since then, you occasionally hum a few lines in deserted places, and your voice can dispel small monsters.

31060.event: At an eating contest, you ate Dragon Breath Chili, caught fire, and died. The inn burned down.

31061.event: A meteorite splashed frozen runes predicting a left-foot trip; next day you fell in dung as runes mocked.

31062.event: You swallow the candy, hiccup rainbows, and translucent unicorns bow to you as a miracle.
31062.postEvent: Later you heard unicorns had painted your rainbow hiccups as a mural and enshrined it in forest sanctuary.

31063.event: You passed the trial by chugging ale upside-down and roaring a recipe, but the society disbanded.

31064.event: A bard praised you for subduing a cyclops, but the hero was a baker with your name.

31065.event: Two ghosts argued; you declared a tie and received immortal ink for an appeal.

31066.event: Stepping into a magical elevator in ancient ruins, you relived embarrassing moments and emerged blushing after three minutes.
31066.postEvent: After that, you made a detour every time you saw a magical elevator.

31067.event: After three days, a pigeon pooped on your shoulder, croaked 'Debt settled,' recalling its meaningful gaze when you fed it.

31068.event: You defended a scarecrow in a fox-chicken trial and got hard-boiled eggs to avoid lawsuits.

31069.event: You won a poetry battle against a bronze dragon, who gave you a scale and praised your rhymes.
31069.postEvent: That scale still hangs around your neck, and occasionally on moonlit nights it emits a deep dragon roar.

31070.event: You solved the Reverse Maze, walking backward, and found your cellar—wine untouched but three years older.

31071.event: You delivered a love letter; the Goblin King proposed to the author, and you officiated, earning a cheese sword.

31072.event: A professor confused you with a student; you accidentally cast a sneezing spell and enrolled in the Sneezing Department.

31073.event: In a rainstorm, you shared a bridge alcove with a vagrant and split your dry rations.

31074.event: You traded your ancestral sword for a 'singing harp,' which could only repeatedly play off-key nursery rhymes.

31075.event: You drank a transformation potion, became a sheep, and after a week with a shepherdess, you missed that carefree life.
31075.postEvent: After recovery, you found yourself exceptionally sensitive to the scent of grass, and even occasionally ruminated.

31076.event: You played chess with a skeleton, lost a lullaby, and won a ghost horse ride.

31077.event: Drunk, you argued with a sentient longsword, dulled it cutting fruit, cut yourself, and silenced it for three days.

31078.event: You complimented the weather to the Tree of Confession; its reply spooked a donkey, costing you compensation.

31079.event: You touched a runestone at the market; it turned to dust, and now your dreams show a backward-flying clock tower.

31080.event: A contrary crow daily repeats your sleep talk backwards from your windowsill and never leaves.
31080.postEvent: It stayed all season and left a silver claw print on the window frame when it flew.

31081.event: You mistakenly drink ale brewed with moonlight, and your hair turns translucent for three days.

31082.event: A weeping gargoyle asks you to recite a love poem, then shatters into rose petals.

31083.event: You pick up a waterproof parchment teaching how to aim at stars with your nose tip.
31083.postEvent: You tried it once, got a stiff neck for three days, but saw constellations invisible to others.

31084.event: During a reverse rainstorm, pedestrians walk backward; only you are normal, and no one remembers.

31085.event: Your shadow leaves you at noon, gets drunk at a tavern, returns reeking at dusk.

31086.event: A wax-sealed letter reveals a name in candle flame—someone you'll meet in three days.
31086.postEvent: The name came true, but the person was a dwarf selling radishes. You bought a basket of radishes.

31087.event: A blindfolded old man waters an iron tree with tears; at dusk it blooms a steel flower with your name.

31088.event: Invited to a mouse wedding, you eat thumb-sized cheese and understand all rodent conspiracies.
31088.postEvent: Afterwards, you often hear gossip about you from behind the walls.

31089.event: Your boots wander to a muddy pond at night, get stuck, then reappear clean by your bed.

31090.event: In the forest, a spider weaving wings asks you to cut a thread, then flies.

31091.event: A knock awakens you; no one is outside, but a warm dragon scale with a map to your heart lies.

31092.event: Your words become floating text that falls as coins, returning to normal after three days.
31092.postEvent: You collected twenty copper coins by talking nonsense.

31093.event: A lost dream spirit enters your ear, making you obsess over your most hated food for a week.
31093.postEvent: The bard's lute lured out the spirit, changing your perspective on onions forever.

31094.event: In a cloud duel, two wind elementals fight over a duck-shaped cloud; loser becomes mint rain.

31095.event: Your hair turns into flowering vines overnight, attracting bees, forcing you to buy a Druid's antidote.
31095.postEvent: The antidote cost all your pocket money, but the honey left by the bees lasts half a year.

31096.event: Opening a wordless book, transparent hands snatch your intelligence snack and comment.

31097.event: A clay pot claims to be a Templar knight's urn, demanding moonlight daily or it will curse your soup lukewarm.
31097.postEvent: You followed its request, and occasionally it uses phosphorescent fire to spell out fragments of lost hymns.

31098.event: At a trial, a cat accuses someone of stealing the moon's reflection; its defense is a three-hour purr.
31098.postEvent: The cat is acquitted and demands compensation from the plaintiff in dried fish.

31099.event: A noose falls around your neck but stays loose like a scarf; passersby tip their hats.

31100.event: In sorrow, your tears become crystal beads. Someone pays high, but crying no longer relieves.
31100.postEvent: You earn a sum of money, but happiness -1 because crying hurts.

31101.event: You find your reflection acting on its own, so you negotiate and agree to share body control.
31101.postEvent: From then on, you are human during the day, and your reflection moves at night. You communicate via sticky notes.

31102.event: A wandering alchemist forces you to drink a potion; you turn purple, not a mushroom.
31102.postEvent: Your skin recovers after three days, but during that time, all mushrooms regard you as kin.

31103.event: You blow a whistle, eggs follow, causing an egg tide, and the seller chases you eight streets.

31104.event: An oak sapling grows from your pillow, feeding on dreams, leaving a prophetic leaf each morning.

31105.event: At midnight, an invisible barber trims your hair into silver threads for socks.
31105.postEvent: You wear these socks that are forever warm.

31106.event: You are dragged to a ghost wedding, witness a skeleton and ghost couple, and receive a rib flute as thanks.
31106.postEvent: The flute's sound can soothe the dead, but it makes the living cringe.

31107.event: On your {age}th birthday, a fallen star cools into a two-meter cheese block in your backyard.
31107.postEvent: The whole town eats it for a month, and finally it becomes a well that gushes milk.

31108.event: You accidentally assemble a dragon skeleton that thanks you and flies off to revive.

31109.event: You buy a mirror showing you thirty years older, aging faster than you each day.

31110.event: Your cinnamon-scented sweat attracts merchants wanting your glands; they grind spices daily at your door.

31111.event: A land octopus lives in your well, writes ink complaints, and you recite apology poems before drawing water.
31111.postEvent: It occasionally rewards you with luminous pearls.

31112.event: A still coin hovers midair when thrown; you catch it to stop a street brawl.

31113.event: You find a Tuesday-only tea house where a retired Time God's butler serves tea revealing your future lover's first kiss.
31113.postEvent: It tastes sour because your future lover is a lemon orchard owner.

31114.event: Your footsteps echo in the open, each step mimicked louder by an invisible giant.

31115.event: A future letter holds a withered leaf; its veins reveal your death date, but the year is unclear.
31115.postEvent: From then on, you forbid any leaves from entering your room.

31116.event: By the river, you find a stone that sings villains' inner monologues, exposing a hypocritical merchant.

31117.event: Your left eye sees pocket cash, but you can't meet eyes.

31118.event: You accept a challenge: live inside a sleeping giant dragon's ear for three days.

31119.event: A translucent old man mistakes you for Death, cries regrets, then fades after your hug.
31119.postEvent: A warm light spot appears in your palm, occasionally glowing hot.

31120.event: At your {age} birthday feast, food argued; bread said broth lacked salt; you calmed them with a rhyme.

31121.event: In the ancient battlefield, you picked up a bladeless sword.

31122.event: Each morning for a week you wore a different uniform, ending Sunday in a dragon priest robe with a sutra.

31123.event: Snail slime wrote 'I am watching you.' I stared half an hour.
31123.postEvent: You finally give it a lettuce leaf, it stays, and its slime updates a nonsense quote daily.

31124.event: At a cloud naming convention, a name you proposed became {charm} cumulus.

31125.event: Your arm strength attracted a squirrel named Bone Crusher who beat you; trees mourned.

31126.event: Helped a mirror ghost comb its hair, then used its moonlight braiding to fend off a raid.

31127.event: You witness an ant parade and receive a grass seed medal making insects friendly but provoking birds.

31128.event: Dying knight had you deliver letter to Sighing River. It said 'Son, I sharpened your sword.' You cried.

31129.event: An armless harpist's toe playing made doors open/close. Your shoelaces were tied in a bow, not a dead knot.

31130.event: You accidentally cast a perpetual spell adding 'coo' to every sentence, and the mage won't remove it.
31130.postEvent: You insisted on removing it, but since then, you still occasionally let out an unconscious 'coo'.

31131.event: In your poorest days, a rusty key unlocked a buried memory and heart knots.

31132.event: You find silver spider silk among white hairs; pulling it brings distant song, leading to a storytelling tree.

31133.event: A stall sold compressed fate. A copper coin bought thirty seconds of brilliant life, then vanished, leaving a smile.

31134.event: Your three-legged cat brings strange items nightly, like an ancient gold coin engraved with your name.

31135.event: In a ruined temple, your backwards prayer echoed; reciting it summoned a hand-walking saint.
31135.postEvent: It gave you an upside-down blessing: every time you fall, you'll find money.

31136.event: A jealous disguise master transformed you into his likeness; you lived as him for three days to pay his debt.

31137.event: Arbitrating Fire and Water's quarrel, you suggested they make soup together, creating steam.

31138.event: An oak tree demanded your sweetest memory as fee, then guided you out. You never tasted such fruit again.

31139.event: You found a demon-summoning spell in a cookbook, summoned a demon, and it became your kitchen assistant for leftovers.

31140.event: In the slums of Port Calassus, you steal your first bread and are adopted by old thief Jack.

31141.event: Sneaking into a mansion, you stole an amulet but triggered a deadly array. Your soul returned to the stars.

31142.event: You joined the Shadow Guild, passed its trial, earned the title Ghost Hand, and specialized in espionage and assassination.

31143.event: Thieves War erupted; guild and city guards fought at night; you lost left eye but saved guild leader Night Hawk.

31144.event: You orchestrated the 'Dawn Heist', stealing the Dragon Tear Gem from the royal treasury, becoming a legend overnight.

31145.event: Night Eagle entrusted you with the guild, making you the new Shadow Master ruling three cities.

31146.event: Imperial spies blackmailed you with old crimes, forcing you to betray your allies. Your conscience and survival instincts clashed fiercely.

31147.event: You killed a spy in a trap, but your lieutenant died saving you, so you trusted no one.

31148.event: You disbanded the guild, distributed assets, and hid in a seaside cottage with seabirds and memories.

31149.event: Enemies found you sleeping, a poison arrow struck your heart. Dying, you felt relief in the moonlight.

31150.event: While herding sheep at Mount Faen's foot, you found a giant purple-scaled egg and took it home.

31151.event: The eggshell cracked, and the young dragon 'Storm' uttered its first cry. The dragon bloodline within you began to awaken.

31152.event: Your bond with the young dragon earned you admission; then brutal training at Dragon Cliff.

31153.event: Your first flight over Tearstone Mountains with Storm fully solidified your mind link, and dragon's might prostrated all beasts.

31154.event: In the Ash War, you and Storm burned two undead fortresses, earning the title 'Knight of Violet Flame'.

31155.event: Your arm shattered protecting Storm; it gave its life force as you died smiling, ending the dragon rider's legend.

31156.event: You and Storm fought Ash Plague; you stabbed its eye, then collapsed and fell into the abyss.

31157.event: Storm weakened from venom; you shared your lifespan via soul communion, both becoming starlight with no regrets.

31158.event: Storm died, buried at its first flight peak. You lost your smile; its dragon soul lives in your blood.

31159.event: You died quietly on the mountaintop, becoming a purple crystal dragon statue revered by later riders.

31160.event: You touch an ancient book in a lord's abandoned library, then suffer runic nightmares nightly.

31161.event: Self-taught Ancient Elvish, you deciphered first page. Summoning a ghostly wisp, forbidden backlash left only a charred finger.

31162.event: Your forbidden pact research gets you into the Shadow Tower's Mage Council, but your somber nature isolates you.

31163.event: In a tower's hidden chamber, a fragment reveals the truth between stars and abyss.

31164.event: Your private Void Projection banished half the tower; imprisoned, you study in secret.

31165.event: You escaped the Rift Era by trading Void knowledge, joined an expedition, and died in an energy storm.

31166.event: In the rift's depths, the ancient grimoire Vil's Mouth begins speaking to you.

31167.event: Half-possessed by the book's Dimensional Traveler, you become half-Void and vanish from reality.

31168.event: Hunted by all order, you tear yourself open atop Tearstone Mountain, banishing Vil's Mouth to the Void and vanishing.

31169.event: At the dock, an old sailor's ballad of the Abyss Princess's treasure plants a voyage dream.

31170.event: You join the Sea Breeze, it's raided, you switch to pirates, and become a petty officer by courage.

31171.event: You win twelve straight fights at Turtle Island's tournament, impressing Blackbeard, and inherit his ship Avenger.

31172.event: You steal a dragon egg in the Misty Sea, are hunted, but can become a dragon tamer.

31173.event: During the Imperial Navy's campaign, you ambushed at Shipwreck Bay, sinking three capital ships and earning the title Bay King.

31174.event: Summoned by the Sea God's priest, you seek the Tide Crown but die in the collapsing ruin.

31175.event: You disband the fleet, sail alone for a healing spring, and lose your way in a storm.

31176.event: On a deserted island, you discover a Naga temple; drinking its water heals and grants prophecy but traps you.

31177.event: You carve prophecies on seashells, give them to an albatross, then smile and die in the temple, becoming stone.

31178.event: As a temple apprentice, you sneak out to share food with beggars and learn wisdom beyond scriptures.

31179.event: You abandon priesthood, leave the City of Light, and travel widely recording customs and wisdom.

31180.event: In the Iron Mountain Kingdom, you mediated a dwarven-human mine war and were named Stone Speaker.

31181.event: While passing through a plague village, you tested poisons, found the antidote, collapsed, were exiled, and died smiling alone.

31182.event: In desert ruins, dying dragon Timesand gives you a reverse scale that glimpses time.

31183.event: You foretold the northern kingdom's doom, were dismissed as mad, then it fell to an avalanche, and you left heartbroken.

31184.event: You wrote "The Wandering Record" in seclusion, attracting countless seekers, but left only three sentences and vanished.

31185.event: The elven queen summoned you to mediate; your Symbiotic Forest proposal achieved a century-long peace pact.

31186.event: Under a starry moon, you meditated on a peak, dissolved into golden light, leaving only that dragon scale.

31187.event: Abandoned in a dark alley, your cries drew a Nightfinger scout who, seeing your potential, raised you.

31188.event: You completed your first burglary, stealing a cursed family crest. The guild mentor's praise carried a hint of amusement.

31189.event: During the Thousand Doors Incident, you unlocked mechanisms, stole a ledger, and split the merchant alliance, boosting the guild.

31190.event: You dueled Shadowblade in a moonlit bell tower, won but were poisoned, and died as the twin moons set.

31191.event: Falsely accused of murdering the guild mentor, you fled, lost an eye, collapsed, and saw the truth before dying.

31192.event: You found the Boots of Dark Leap, gained teleportation, and began your revenge as Wraith.

31193.event: You schemed to pit your enemy guild against guards, stole the Eternal Tear, and achieved fame.

31194.event: Overwhelmed by old wounds and the curse, on your deathbed you discovered the emblem as its source, dying with regret.

31195.event: You gathered your last companions, stormed their headquarters, and died with your nemesis, your legend sealed in shadows.

31196.event: While herding sheep on a mountain, you mistook a dragon egg for a warm stone and slept with it nightly.

31197.event: During a lunar eclipse, a dragon egg hatched, bonded with you, leaving a contract sigil on your left arm.

31198.event: Your first flight with the young dragon alarmed the lord, so you fled the village with it.

31199.event: Unbowed, you and your dragon fought the Inferno Dragon until consumed, but dying awakened ancient fire resistance, becoming a legend in ashes.

31200.event: You and your dragon drank blood for Dragon Speech, but it burned your life; your legend endures.

31201.event: You founded the Dragon Knight Order, recruited exiles and wild dragons, and fought for justice on dragonback.

31202.event: You refuse to sacrifice your dragon, perish with the ancient king in dragonfire, and your name becomes a war song for future knights.

31203.event: Turning your dragon blood into a catalyst, you cast a forbidden spell.

31204.event: Lost in the monastery library, you opened a talking spellbook, branding the Eye of Wisdom on your forehead.

31205.event: You broke your mentor's seven-layered magical seal, found a prophetic Star-Law Codex, and became obsessed with grimoires.

31206.event: You applied to be a cataloguer at the Great Library, secretly studied restricted texts, and made a pact with ghost.

31207.event: Your beloved wife died of plague. You tried to revive her using the 'Codex of the Dead,' but the spell.

31208.event: You found the Omniscient Page. Reading it makes you forget a name, yet it feels sweet.

31209.event: Using your own blood as ink, you transcribed the 'Book of Truth.

31210.event: Using the Book of Truth, you turned the Great Library into a living labyrinth and became its core.

31211.event: You went to sea with your father and encountered a storm.

31212.event: You joined privateers, cut down three men in your first boarding, and the captain gave you a notched cutlass.

31213.event: On an unnamed island, cursed spring water turned you into an amphibious Sea Ghost feared by the crew.

31214.event: You seized flagship Abyss Sigh, terrorized trade routes under black sails, using sea monsters to escape encirclement.

31215.event: During a storm, you found ancient Sololis and a golden compass revealing the Eye of the Maelstrom's location.

31216.event: Navy and hunters closed in. You scuttled ship, led followers into cave. Collapse trapped you. Lit last torch, entered abyss.

31217.event: You understood the compass's secret, sailed alone to the maelstrom, saw an inverted temple, and landed as your body crystallized.

31218.event: You entered the temple core, reset the compass, closed the maelstrom, and became a crystal statue sealing the rift.

31219.event: Found a tattered map in study, 'Truth is in the footsteps' in dragon blood. Then sleepwalked to distant lands.

31220.event: You renounce your inheritance, leave home in coarse robes, and meet a dying star-seer, inheriting his astrolabe.

31221.event: Using the astrolabe in elven ruins breaks Eternal Spring's seal, granting no hunger but eternal wandering.

31222.event: Using an ancient proverb, you shame both kings into ending a war, and your words become the Sage's Maxims.

31223.event: After seven days conversing with ghosts in Weeping Mist Swamp, you obtain Record of the Underworld, your forehead glows faintly.

31224.event: You discover the Inverted Tower, stargaze seven days, learn Gathering Fate, and die as light scatters.

31225.event: You use a spell to save a dragon-slain girl, age rapidly, smile as she awakens, then die.

31226.event: At dawn, you climb the World's Spine, face the sun, and scatter into light drifting to lost travelers' shoulders.

31227.event: A nameless infant abandoned in Eldran's slum alley is taken in by old thief Blinn.

31228.event: Blinn teaches him lockpicking and stealth. On his first theft, he lifts a family crest ring from a nobleman.

31229.event: He passes the trial by silently climbing the moonlit bell tower and joins the Darkfinger guild.

31230.event: He follows senior thief into mage tower, triggers runic alarm, escapes illusion maze, and develops fear of magic.

31231.event: He alone steals the city lord's treasury, takes the Star Tear Gem, gains fame, but faces a 3000 gold bounty.

31232.event: Internal strife erupts; he kills the traitor but suffers a fatal wound and falls.

31233.event: In shadow war, he uses sewers to blow up knight arsenal, becomes guild hero, but no turning back.

31234.event: Hired to steal a horn from a frost giant priest, he fights a spirit but is cursed and frozen.

31235.event: He discovers the ring he stole unlocks a dungeon seal, causing monsters to spew forth.

31236.event: To atone, he returns the ring, meets a lich, sacrifices an eye, but dies in the wasteland.

31237.event: Elected guild leader, betrayed and poisoned, he survives but loses strength and fades away.

31238.event: Born in the Dragon Herder tribe, his umbilical blood cracked a dragon egg fossil with faint light.

31239.event: Dragon plague hits the tribe. Chieftain gives him a dragon egg and orders an escort. Tribe disappears in fog.

31240.event: On a stormy night, a cyan-blue hatchling broke from its egg, locking eyes and forming a soul link.

31241.event: He test-flew with hatchling Thunderwing in the valley, riding the wind and feeling the sky's call.

31242.event: Thunderwing killed a giant eagle with lightning, first tasting a dragon rider's glory and responsibility.

31243.event: The knights discovered him and tried to conscript him, so he fled with the dragon across the Misty Swamp.

31244.event: In the dark forest, a reclusive sage taught him an ancient dragon-tongue scroll to strengthen dragon breath.

31245.event: Riding giant dragon Thunderwing in the Battle of Stone-Split Valley, its breath turned the tide, making him a hero.

31246.event: The Dragon King awoke, summoning all dragons. Thunderwing, in agony, resolved to obey.

31247.event: At Dragon Nest, he and Thunderwing used forbidden Soul Flame to stop Dragon King, sacrificing himself; both fell into magma.

31248.event: He was born to scholars at Velantia Academy, cradled among rare magic tomes.

31249.event: He opened his grandfather's forbidden book, glimpsed alien geometric patterns that were seared into his mind.

31250.event: He entered the academy's advanced class youngest; his mentor marveled but warned against forbidden knowledge.

31251.event: He found a human-skin grimoire named Immortal Whispers and secretly copied its summoning rituals.

31252.event: He died at 23 after a forbidden summoning backfired, tearing his soul apart.

31253.event: Expelled for heresy, he fled with copies and set up a secret lab in an abandoned lighthouse.

31254.event: The Void Steward's defiance angered a god, crystallizing his body and trapping his soul as a warning.

31255.event: Hired with forbidden knowledge to seal the resurrected ancient demon, he became both savior and monster in the kingdom's eyes.

31256.event: The Void Steward demanded payment; he refused, activating a reverse summoning that annihilated him entirely.

31257.event: She was born in a South Sea fishing village to pearl diver parents, with a scale-like birthmark on her ankle.

31258.event: After pirates raided her village, she was enslaved, rowed until death, then cast into the sea.

31259.event: She incited a slave revolt, seized a two-masted schooner 'Sea Serpent', was elected captain, and hoisted black sails.

31260.event: She plundered a ship and sank the kingdom's flagship with reefs, gaining fame in the North Sea.

31261.event: She fought a giant octopus, was dragged down, but a current saved her, washing her ashore scarred but alive.

31262.event: The Sea Serpent embedded the Eye of the Tide, gaining power over currents and becoming a sea legend.

31263.event: She used mirages and whirlpools to annihilate the kingdom's fleet, earning the title 'Marquise of the Raging Waves'.

31264.event: She saved an exiled siren princess, who prophesied her death in the world-ending abyss.

31265.event: Weary of plundering, she sought the Return-to-Void Treasure for immortality, sailing to the deadly southern seas.

31266.event: She recognized her destiny and sailed into the whirlpool, vanishing in thunder and rainbow light.

31267.event: Born under a golden meteor, he was named the Star Child and raised in the Cathedral of Light.

31268.event: At age seven, he could perform high-level healing magic and was revered as the Saint Child by followers.

31269.event: As youngest priest, he read a forbidden tome, questioned doctrine, and caused uproar at a prayer meeting.

31270.event: At trial, he refused to recant, was defrocked, branded, exiled, then calmly walked into the wilderness.

31271.event: He met a dying dwarf prophet who gave him a runestone that enlightened him about the world's origin.

31272.event: He saved thousands from a plague with potions and wells, earning the title 'Wandering Sage'.

31273.event: He used his soul as a lamp to guide ancient ghost soldiers to peace, then aged and died serenely.

31274.event: He wrote 'The Book of No Light' on divinity in all beings, causing second schism, and was secretly followed.

31275.event: He stood in a rune array, bore sacred flame, and banished an evil god's avatar, but turned to ashes.

31276.event: He left teachings across lands, sat in a dead volcano, ascended as light, leaving an empty robe and newborn flowers.

31277.event: In Grey Harbor's slums, cold and hunger taught him to cut purses with a stolen bone-handled knife.

31278.event: A Shadowthorn headhunter found his talent, led him into the tunnel maze, where he first touched the shadow network.

31279.event: While stealing a lightning ring from a mage tower, he triggered a trap and died. Only the ring remained.

31280.event: He won the guild's power struggle, became youngest deacon, and ordered looting of a gnome workshop that refused protection fees.

31281.event: He infiltrated a noble ball in disguise, stole the Star Tear Gem, shaking the court and embarrassing the secret police.

31282.event: His love for a paladin spy, a rusted dagger buried deep, forced him to frame her to save his guild.

31283.event: He stole a secret file and learned he was a fallen noble's illegitimate son with dragon blood.

31284.event: He awakened dragon blood, burst into flames in gang fight, named Flame Shadow, took over guild secret force.

31285.event: His second-in-command assassinated him for betraying a pact. Flame Shadow died by poison and blade.

31286.event: He found an injured dragon whelp in a mountain ruin, removed a bolt, and their souls touched.

31287.event: During a high-altitude trial at Dragon Cliff Fort, he fell and died. A whelp's cry was his last memory.

31288.event: His dragon Zidian matured, carrying him through storms to battle Griffin Knights and rescue a defeated royal coalition.

31289.event: He ventured alone into a cavern to persuade a corrupted ancient dragon to stop its vengeance, saving a city-state.

31290.event: He found cursed armor on Dragon Grave Island, gaining dragon traits but haunted by souls and losing his mind.

31291.event: During the Dragon Communion ritual, he linked lives with Zidian. Runes appeared on its wings; his hair turned white.

31292.event: He commanded twelve war dragons in the Second Sky Battle, destroying undead skeletons, earning the title Sky Watcher.

31293.event: Zidian withered from a curse; he took its last life, and they sank together in Dragonfall Valley, souls merging.

31294.event: In his uncle's study, he opened a coverless handwritten copy, seeing upside-down backgrounds and self-igniting text, planting the spellbook's seed.

31295.event: He joined Silvermoon's Arcane Academy, expelled in year two for reading a forbidden void book, then fled with its pages.

31296.event: He dug up a stone slab from a lost temple, decoded an astral spell, and summoned a stardust familiar.

31297.event: The curse of the Fifth Truth trapped him in nightmares until cannibals burned him at a totem bonfire.

31298.event: The power of the magic eye exceeded the limits of a mortal body.

31299.event: Guided by the magic eye, he found the Book of All Causes under an ancient dragon's heart, triggering an earthquake.

31300.event: He read the last chapter to change his fate, but was pulled into the book and body turned to stone in the restricted section.

31301.event: The fishing village was plundered by pirates. She was taken aboard the ship.

31302.event: She incited a slave revolt aboard the ship and seized control of the two-masted sailing vessel.

31303.event: She seized an imperial escort with magic arms, found a conch blessed by the sea goddess raising storms and fog.

31304.event: She convinced ten captains at the Pirate Council via three duels and a map, becoming provisional admiral.

31305.event: The blood pact transformed her: scales, gills, then she leaped into a stormy sea, vanishing as Nasiya the Raging Wave.

31306.event: Her fleet breached Pearl Wall, looted the treasury, making her a legend but drawing a massive enemy siege.

31307.event: The conch's overtone woke the Kraken, dragging both fleets into the abyss, leaving a whirlpool—Nasia's legend ended.

31308.event: She steered her burning flagship into the Kraken's giant eye, detonating the ship's gunpowder and magic crystals all at once.

31309.event: After a meteor shower, he was found glowing beside a crater, calm, clutching a star-engraved meteorite.

31310.event: He left the temple, crossed a desert as a youth, calmed a gargoyle with astrolabe runes, impressing pursuers.

31311.event: He spent three years at the Dwarf Kingdom's forge, forging the moon-refracting staff Starbreaker from starfall iron.

31312.event: In a border kingdom, he used prophecies to end a princely feud, becoming the revered Star Arbiter.

31313.event: He solved the riddles of a cursed elven tomb, released starlight, and turned the forest silver.

31314.event: He built an observatory on a peak, took disciples, and gathered scholars of all races.

31315.event: He decoded ancient scripts, predicted a star's path in a millennium, advised kings and dragons calmly, and refused rewards.

31316.event: He carved his lifelong knowledge onto twelve meteorite tablets for nations, then dissolved into starlight.

31317.event: He raised a banner against ancient dragons, charged as a mortal, and fell with them into the abyss, his name.

31318.event: The lost Star Vault grimoire library reappeared, unleashing forbidden knowledge that drove researchers and power seekers mad.

31319.event: The Shadow Brotherhood thieves' guild seized several city-states' underdark, forging a new order with rumors and daggers.

31320.event: Redbeard unified the Shattered Coast, starting the Golden Pirate Era; ships trembled, treasure legends burned.

31321.event: A nameless sage warns of Ragnarök in the square, forcing heroes and cowards to choose.

31322.event: The Blood-Tear Plague killed you; you became a restless spirit. The Adventurer's Guild's pleas went unanswered.

31323.event: St. Melos Magic Academy in the floating city recruits talented apprentices chosen by starlight from across the continent.

31324.event: The king held a knighthood ceremony, vowing the blade points to fate. The courageous may kneel for the crest.

31325.event: In mortal form, Light God Anora bloomed wastelands and judged sinners into salt pillars.

31326.event: Thousands of abyssal fissures opened, ancient dungeons emerged, and adventurers queued as blades and magic lit the darkness.

31327.event: The Thieves' Guild and Pirate King Redbeard united land and sea outlaws in a steel ring.

31328.event: Caught in the Dragonrider civil war, dragon fire consumed you to ashes.

31329.event: The Trial of Fate's light burned your soul, leaving a fading star and unfinished legend.

31330.event: Abyssal rift opened under the capital. Demon tide swept you, soul devoured. Guild summons too late; you died.

31331.event: The mysterious Star-Cloud Caravan airship guild brought Eastern curiosities and lost magic, shattering old wealth orders.

31332.event: You answered the Northern Dragon's call, tamed a frost-winged beast, and became legend with shattered oaths.

31333.event: Reading the forbidden void texts drove you mad, sucking your soul into the rift and leaving an empty shell.

31334.event: You were drawn into a thieves' plot to steal the Crown of Night. A manhunt put you in danger.

31335.event: You joined pirates, fought for the Sea God's Trident in a sunken city, but a maelstrom sank everything.

31336.event: You meditated on soul reconstruction, freed yourself from flesh, and ascended into the void as your body cooled.

31337.event: You stood under the falling Silver Star Tower. An arcane blast scorched and shredded you, leaving an eternal echo.

31338.event: When spring returned, Dream Leaves grew. You found and drank them, dreaming of fate's turning point.

31339.event: At Starfall Plain, you knelt before the Knight King to become the Starlight Knight, feeling chivalry surge.

31340.event: The Withering Plague turns you into a crystalline statue, a priceless artwork.

31341.event: Drunken dwarf mistakes you for apprentice, gives ale-oozing hammer, attracts rats.

31342.event: Street magician turns your hat into a raven with a monocle that gives accurate prophecies.

31343.event: Glowing fungi cause hallucination; you discuss existentialism with stag beetle and wake holding leaf with equation.

31344.event: An invisible letter invites you to a midnight banquet of mirrors; afterwards, half your hair turns starry sky, undyeable.

31345.event: You wake to find your shadow missing; it wins an arm-wrestling match and returns richer but silent.

31346.event: Buy a map, dig up a ring, and understand squirrels chattering about nuts.

31347.event: In Starry Dome Library, a cursed cookbook roars a griffin recipe, shocking scholars; librarian chains it.

31348.event: Statue gives you memories of being cheese merchant Emilio; everything smells like cheddar for three days.

31349.event: Sheltering from a storm in a cave, stalactites play an ancient melody; now your feet feel the earth's pulse.

31350.event: Claim to cure dragon scale itch brings a shy dragon; you scratch its itch and receive a cerulean scale.

31351.event: A teapot tree gives you tea tasting like a grandmother's hug; then you can whistle any tune.

31352.event: Your jester act makes champion drop his lance; he knights you Squire of Laughter with a bronze badge.

31353.event: Every full moon your flask gives hated pumpkin soup; you splash the moon; next day it's celery.

31354.event: Portal throws you onto an ice field with screaming penguins; you return with feathers.

31355.event: Sleepwalking troll on roof; you give it a calming flower, and it sleeps until dawn.

31356.event: You buy a living mirror that cleans when you're out, scatters books, and makes faces.

31357.event: Stepping on a polymorphic circle turns you into a frog; you attend a mosquito summit and give a speech.

31358.event: An old sailor gives you a pearl that only glows blue when you hiccup, illuminating your embarrassment.

31359.event: At a masked banquet, you dance with apparitions of your past selves, who dissolve into a teardrop crystal.

31360.event: A weeping scarecrow asks you to retrieve its lover's clothes; they embrace and turn into doves.

31361.event: After eating a magic mushroom, you speak opposites, resolving a grudge and getting a kiss, but can't explain later.

31362.event: You find a coin that returns after spending, so you always have one coin.

31363.event: You rescue a fairy who grants a trivial wish, but the bacon is made of earthworms.

31364.event: You become Guardian of the Dusk Cheese, gaining foresight about milk only for one minute.

31365.event: A beggar claiming to be future you gives a coin and a cryptic message, then vanishes.
31365.postEvent: At midnight, the coin became blue smoke, leaving a gold mark: observed by fate.

31366.event: Frogs in suits fine you for eavesdropping on their assembly; your steps now make 'ribbit' sounds.
31366.postEvent: You got free drinks but were expelled for impersonating amphibian nobility.

31367.event: At an antique shop, you bought a boastful rusty sword that critiques your fighting and wails if discarded.
31367.postEvent: You eventually compromised, enduring its lectures day after day, and your swordsmanship actually improved a tiny bit.

31368.event: After eating a glowing ear-shaped mushroom, you see the wind as translucent galloping cats for three days.
31368.postEvent: When the wind stopped, cats curled at your feet; now you recall that force whenever you see a cat.

31369.event: A goblin sells you a paper reading 'Void'; a count later buys it for ten times the price.
31369.postEvent: You suddenly became a master speculator, but you knew you had just been caught in an absurd scam.

31370.event: A mirror showing your twenty-year-old self making faces led to a profitable tavern act.
31370.postEvent: A month later, the mirror person suddenly disappeared, leaving only one sentence: "The lease is up, switching hosts."

31371.event: A sage says a foot-sweat deity lives in your shoe; you find a tiny altar inside.
31371.postEvent: After that, long marches made dry warmth rise from your feet like a divine massage.

31372.event: You win the 'Most Elegant Fall' award at a tournament, falling like a swan, and get watered ale.
31372.postEvent: The judge's comment: "Lost, but lost with the texture of an epic."

31373.event: You find a book predicting every breakfast; fate always makes you eat as written.
31373.postEvent: You finally gave up struggling and began looking forward each night to seeing what tomorrow's breakfast would be.

31374.event: An eight-year-old boy stops your horse with foxtail grass, calls you father, and you eventually feed him lamb chops and send him home.
31374.postEvent: His wife planted dog-tail grass; it grew wildly, blooming silvery leaves, making your home a neighbor's pilgrimage.

31375.event: While peeing in the wild, a giant mushroom chased you three li until you offered honey wine.
31375.postEvent: Ever since, whenever you relieve yourself, you first look around and silently recite, "No offense intended."

31376.postEvent: When you escaped in the chaos, you found a never-wearing snake-shaped dagger in your shadow.

31377.event: You freed a unicorn from vines. It nosed your forehead, giving your hair a silver sheen for a month.
31377.postEvent: That month, noblewomen vied for your hair care tips in salons.

31378.event: You caught a chattering octopus, an exiled undersea secretary, offering court secrets for bathtub shelter.
31378.postEvent: For a month, your bathroom became the city's top social venue as nobles queued for gossip.

31379.event: A coin with your face says you are dead; it's a prank by your living cousin.
31379.postEvent: You had mixed feelings, but still strung the coin on a chain as an ironic talisman against fate.

31380.event: Overnight you understood only bird curses; a week of profanity shattered your worldview.
31380.postEvent: When the power faded, chattering sparrows seemed to gossip about your baldness.

31381.event: After swapping luck with a stranger, you find a wallet, a treasure map, but step in horse dung.
31381.postEvent: At midnight all vanished except a strange emerald ring with an unknown crest in your pocket.

31382.event: You locked eyes with a burly bearded man, lost a blinking duel, then carried boxes for him all day.
31382.postEvent: You learned he was the city guard captain, so he offered a sinecure—low pay but enough for ale.

31383.event: You dreamed of becoming cheese chased by rats; you woke to bitten sheets and missing cheese.
31383.postEvent: Neighbors whispered you squeaked like a rat at night, so you avoided dairy, fearing you'd melt into a nightmare.

31384.event: You found an ancient Dwarf vending machine that called your existence a beautiful mistake.
31384.postEvent: You clutched the note, stared blankly, tucked it into a poetry anthology, and read it when spirits were low.

31385.event: You warm a water elemental's bath; it sings an ancient sea song.
31385.postEvent: Since then, whenever you approach a river or the ocean, the ancient melody faintly echoes in your ears.

31386.event: You receive a gilded invitation, dress up, and are pulled by fire to a crater where six dragons wait.
31386.postEvent: During a tea ceremony, dragons give a talisman and teleport you home in a singed tuxedo.

31387.event: Wizards praise you for three hours; you swell and laugh until you get a stitch.
31387.postEvent: Afterward, you hiccupped for three days, and each hiccup produced a rose petal.

31388.event: At a campfire, an old hunter invited you to roast the moon. He vanished at dawn, leaving a moonstone.
31388.postEvent: The stone can illuminate three steps at night, but you always feel it staring at you.

31389.event: A mad prophet foretold you'd trip on Fireday; you did, and found a silver coin.
31389.postEvent: The coin was engraved with an open eye and grew slightly warm in your palm.

31390.event: A dried bat messenger tied a letter with spider silk; your handwriting, but dragon breath left only "never".
31390.postEvent: You tried to reply via a crystal ball, but only heard crackling static.

31391.event: You bought a magic cookbook that reveals bizarre recipes; eating Gargoyle's Dream Stew left you numb and speaking backward.
31391.postEvent: That night, your room occasionally echoed with stone-grinding laughter.

31392.event: A tiny green frog in a misty marsh recited a terrible love poem, claiming to be a cursed prince.
31392.postEvent: The frog puffed up its cheeks in anger and shot a rainbow-colored water arrow, soaking your boots.

31393.event: A palm-sized blue jellyfish drifts in on full moons, leaves a frozen teardrop crystal tasting of salt and sorrow.
31393.postEvent: You made it into a necklace, and at night you can hear distant tidal sounds.

31394.event: In a spore-filled cave, you joined a contest of singing mushroom people, won a moldy crown, and got a headache.
31394.postEvent: The crown turned to powder at sunrise, but your hair turned bright blue for a full week.

31395.event: Teleported in sleep to a mirrored bedroom, you twisted a candlestick and woke with a reverse-jointed right hand.
31395.postEvent: You used this ability once to pick a lock, but it soon returned to normal.

31396.event: In the library's far corner, a book you opened held your dream of flying, dated tomorrow.
31396.postEvent: You hurriedly closed the book. When you reopened it, it was blank.

31397.event: A mischievous invisible sprite pranks you; you glimpsed its violet eyes in a bronze mirror.
31397.postEvent: After you protested loudly, it left a never-wilting iron jasmine and never appeared again.

31398.event: You ate an elven fruit; your words became falling petals, drawing stares all day.
31398.postEvent: Not until midnight did the last marigold petal fall from your lips, and your voice returned.

31399.event: At the market, you paid a hooded figure for a memory and dreamed of riding a dragon.
31399.postEvent: After waking, you faintly recalled a word of Dragonish, but couldn't quite pronounce it.

31400.event: Before a heavy rain, clouds split with thunder, formed a feather, and salty rain wet your face.
31400.postEvent: For the next month, all the patterns you drew unconsciously took the outline of dragon wings.

31401.event: Your shadow moves independently, mimics future moves, and makes you thirsty.
31401.postEvent: This incident became a joke among your companions, but the shadow never harmed you.

31402.event: You deliver a love letter to a gargoyle; it drops a blue sapphire into your palm.
31402.postEvent: The client remained anonymous. The sapphire later turned into a stone flower.

31403.event: At sunset, a glowing door leads to wheat fields where the wind calls your true name.
31403.postEvent: The door never opened for you again, but that single grain, when planted, grew into a silver ear of wheat.

31404.event: A cat gives you a ring; you understand cat language and their sarcasm.
31404.postEvent: The ring turned to black smoke after three days, but you had learned the cat's venomous tongue.

31405.event: After drinking an empathy potion, you see halos; a laughing merchant's gray-black halo reveals despair.
31405.postEvent: After the potion wore off, faces seemed to lack color.

31406.event: In a sunken temple, your reflection wore a crown and offered a withered rose that left a scent.
31406.postEvent: From that day on, you occasionally saw translucent ancient characters floating in the air.

31407.event: Ghosts teach you the 'Void Whirl' dance; phosphorescent flowers bloom underfoot.
31407.postEvent: You found yourself five pounds lighter and subtly improved in constitution.

31408.event: An old oak tree uprooted, chased you, then tearfully embraced you and hummed an ancient lullaby.
31408.postEvent: Every time you passed there afterward, the tree would drop a few leaves, as if waving.

31409.event: On a dragon-scorched riverbed, you find a warm, fist-sized black stone that pulses orange at night and echoes ancient battle.
31409.postEvent: One day it shattered, spilling out a complete small finger bone of a dragon, which then turned to powder.

31410.event: You buy a potion to meet a prince; guards treat you as royalty for half a day.
31410.postEvent: When the real prince showed up, you were sitting on his throne eating an apple. You were politely escorted out.

31411.event: In a dream, you scratch a dragon's itch; it teaches a word that freezes water.
31411.postEvent: But the second utterance failed, as if the word had evaporated from your tongue.

31412.event: You find a tombstone with your name in a cemetery; it disappears the next day.
31412.postEvent: A small line of text appeared on the inside of your wrist: 'Sooner or later, you are already here.'

31413.event: Wineglass dance bet with druid yields juice causing three days of bird calls.
31413.postEvent: Thereafter, every time you got drunk, you would unconsciously whistle like a nightingale, infuriating the tavern cats.

31414.event: You found the World Recipe, baked a talking cake under the full moon; it said your yeast was expired.
31414.postEvent: You buried it, then a tree grew cotton candy that only said yeast.

31415.event: A knight challenged you to sit by a snoring griffin; you sneezed, lost, and recited a slug poem.
31415.postEvent: After the poem, a passing slug laid a shiny slime on your shoe, which could block one malicious curse.

31416.event: Mistaken for a dead prophet, you consecrated a stone that split, revealing a rain prediction that came true.
31416.postEvent: Joyful devotees gift you an old cloak with cloud-embroidered lining, like a weather forecast.

31417.event: Lost in forest, you heard flute; a fox taught mushrooms periodic table. You left with a glowing mushroom.
31417.postEvent: This mushroom became your free night-reading light, flickering at the word 'gold'.

31418.event: An air elemental invited you to a cloud giant wedding on a floating island, where rainwater soup revealed a rainbow.
31418.postEvent: You returned home five pounds lighter and understood bees complaining about pollen allergies.

31419.event: Upon tearing it off, the sun turns gray for a minute.
31419.postEvent: From then on, you mix a unique orange-red, and countless artists offer fortunes for your formula.

31420.event: At a thrift store, a broken cauldron warned against mandrake, so the potion made mice tap dance.
31420.postEvent: You earned silver coins performing with dancing mice, but they struck for better cheese.

31421.event: Halfling kids made you play evil dragon; your roar summoned a real dragon blowing rainbow smoke.
31421.postEvent: Your clothes hold rainbow scale powder forever, and coughing releases puffs that attract butterflies.

31422.event: A statue's scepter knocked you unconscious for three seconds; now you see hidden text above everyone's head.
31422.postEvent: The effect disappeared after a day, but whenever you have a headache, you briefly see what others ate last night.

31423.event: Blank book in forbidden library; dreams wrote mediocre life. Week later, it closed as 'Memoirs of a Boot'.
31423.postEvent: You donated it to Starry Pavilion and received a bookmark that changes color when kissed.

31424.event: Alchemist gave you a potion; your lungs hummed D minor chords. Passersby thought you were a walking instrument.
31424.postEvent: After the potion faded at night, you missed it, bought a harmonica, but never played that tune again.

31425.event: A knight gave you a locked box; you opened it, found feather and note, then your cat ignored you forever.
31425.postEvent: You tried to win it back with premium fish jerky, but the familiar only rolled its eyes at you.

31426.event: Met Weather Merchant; traded gold sand for your pocket coins. Gave three coppers, got an always-raining cloud.
31426.postEvent: You kept it in a flowerpot, watered daily; it became a cumulonimbus that rains only on neighbors.

31427.event: Your boots hum an ancient cursed ballad, making nearby monsters sway and end the battle peacefully.
31427.postEvent: You found cursed sheet music stuck to a sole, framed it, and it changes tune nightly.

31428.event: After accidentally drinking a Clarity Potion, you stayed awake three days, read all cookbooks, and invented canned dragon meat.
31428.postEvent: The Adventurers' Guild bought your product for a fortune, but now cans make you dizzy.

31429.event: A teleportation accident sent your ear to a banquet where you learned the king is a potato spirit.
31429.postEvent: Scared, you avoided potatoes for two years until the king was deposed and mashed potatoes returned.

31430.event: You learned the Eternal Rose was fake clay, but tended it for decades.
31430.postEvent: You laughed heartily, molded the flower into a permanently grinning dragon, which still sits on the windowsill smirking.

31431.event: While walking in the moonlight, your shadow detached from you and chased a glowing moth. You chased it all night.
31431.postEvent: The glow at night lights your path but prevents you from sneaking up on anyone.

31432.event: In a tavern card game, you tore a mocking shadow card in half, creating two noisier cards.
31432.postEvent: You sold them for a Ring of Stupidity, but wear it as a necklace to avoid miscalculating numbers.

31433.event: Judging the Most Boring Magic Contest, you laughed so hard you cried at silly spells.
31433.postEvent: Afterward, you gained the useless minor magic to automatically reheat tea cups; each time, the cup softly hums an aria.

31434.event: At an ancient dragon graveyard, you picked up a petrified dragon tooth.
31434.postEvent: After eating, the dragon snored on your roof for three days, then left a scale now lining your umbrella.

31435.event: A vengeful dragon-slaying hero's armor made you attend a snail's funeral, then dissolved into a heart guard.
31435.postEvent: The heartguard reflected a poisoned arrow after you embedded it in your chest.

31436.event: While chatting at an inn, you mentioned a missed opportunity from your youth.
31436.postEvent: After returning, you lost the memory of your first love, yet still felt an inexplicable warmth, as if there was.

31437.event: Silver coin that didn't reflect you; under pillow, dreamed of becoming a silver fish in a cloud sea.

31438.event: A wandering circus made you vanish for a day, and you returned clutching an eternal ice-crystal strawberry.

31439.event: You fed an invisible unicorn poems and carrots, found golden dung from a neighbor's horse, sold dearly to an alchemist.

31440.event: Lost in the forest, a walking tree gave you a walnut whose sand holds eternal ocean waves.

31441.event: After eating a glowing mushroom, the world turned upside down for three days, and math felt natural.

31442.event: Bowing to a knight painting, an iron hand gave a rusty gauntlet, saying return when you reach the sword rack.

31443.event: Stepped on invisible cloak, nabbed by Thieves' Guild, apprenticed three days, sent for sneezing, learned lockpicking for candy boxes.

31444.event: You lost seven rock-paper-scissors rounds to your shadow, which detached, went to market, and returned with a paper dragon.

31445.event: Found a rusty box in a well; starlight poured out. Silver water gave your voice wind chime clarity.

31446.event: A giant owl mistook you for a mail carrier, forcing you to deliver an elf letter for everlasting honey candy.

31447.event: You saw dragon silhouette, shouted name, clouds parted, believed you could tame dragons.

31448.event: Found bone flute at battlefield ruin. Blew it, phantom soldiers appeared. Necromancer took flute, left necromancy book.

31449.event: Bet on picking ghost flowers, found a translucent one, heard whispers, fell ill three days, it withered.

31450.event: You found a haunted chessboard in the attic; winning made reality sharper, the opponent a century-old ghost.

31451.event: Found dragon-script bottle, used as chamber pot, dreamed of flying, sold for three gold coins.

31452.event: Guild's crystal glitched, misjudged you as dragon-slaying prodigy. Trained with squire three days, sent back, got wooden sword.

31453.event: Received note: avoid blueberry pie Tuesday. Didn't eat; family got sick. Now believe any prophecy.

31454.event: Fell asleep in cowshed, licked awake by cow, emitted milky scent, attracted stray cats that followed for month, vanished.

31455.event: Trapped in wizard's cellar for three days, talking mouse led you out; now understand mouse squeaks, mostly nonsense.

31456.event: In an abandoned alchemy workshop, you drank a glowing potion, turned to starlight, shattered, leaving scorched marks.

31457.event: Hiding in an abandoned coffin during hide-and-seek, you float over the village, circle three times, land softly, and fall asleep.

31458.event: Hooded stranger gave dragon's tooth for porridge; dog buried it; family dreamed of treasure, dug up ancient gold coin.

31459.event: Discovered dragon's breath grass, slipped and fell, caught by a dragon kite. Now dizzy at heights, constitution lowered.

31460.event: Chosen as Sun Crown Child, you saw emotions as colors for three days: red anger, blue sorrow, gold joy.

31461.event: You understood swallows mocking your white hair; you argued back, starting a legend of a crazy old man.

31462.event: A vendor claims you're the lost Knight King, gives a rusty sword, then flees, leaving you bewildered.
31462.postEvent: Later, you used that sword to chop firewood, and it turned out to be surprisingly handy.

31463.event: Your shadow danced the Moon Shadow Dance alone, then shrank back when you looked.

31464.event: A time-magic letter from forty years ago scolds you for not feeding a cat that became the academy's guardian.
31464.postEvent: You eventually found the cat's grave and offered belated food.

31465.event: Your cat predicted a meteorite, but a meteorite-shaped cake fell and tasted good.

31466.event: You unearth a rusted chest from a dry well, open it to childhood mementos, and sit with it all afternoon.
31466.postEvent: Childhood memories brought peace to your mind.

31467.event: A violent sneeze gave you webbed frog hands for ten seconds, making you feel the world's magic is arbitrary.

31468.event: A Memory Merchant traded a griffin ride for your dragon-slaying failure, leaving a lingering void.
31468.postEvent: You gained a memory that didn't belong to you, but also lost a piece of reality.

31469.event: Stumbled into fairy moonlight tea, drank truth honeydew, confessed youthful debauchery, then knelt on broom.

31470.event: On your 81st birthday, lost teeth became gold coins, earning you the nickname of dropping gold teeth.
31470.postEvent: Unfortunately, you only have three teeth left.

31471.event: The mirror's reflection sighed and said you should have married the tavern landlady, then returned to normal.

31472.event: Friend wakes at his funeral, asks for barbecue, turning it into a birthday feast.
31472.postEvent: Since then, every year on his "death anniversary" has become a barbecue festival.

31473.event: On your {age}th birthday morning, you find a silver feather levitating under moonlight, spelling 'butter bread' in Ancient Dragon.
31473.postEvent: Afterwards, you tried to use it to write letters, but the recipients only felt a dizzying hunger.

31474.event: A giant toad, the Knight of Penance, blocked you and accused you of crushing its baptized godson snail.
31474.postEvent: Forced to sign a snail reincarnation petition, you received a seaweed medal as it cried like a child.

31475.event: Lost in a dwarven mine, you found glowing mushrooms judging a water-thieving moss, and became their gavel.
31475.postEvent: Tap your heel thrice: moss exiled to spring, mushrooms grant a Wet Soil Contract keeping your flask moist.

31476.event: Your stuttering sword only fluently shouts "Watch out!" in danger, otherwise complains about its tight scabbard.
31476.postEvent: You oiled it nightly and told stories; its stutter healed, but it praised your slashes with poetry.

31477.event: Your great-great-grandfather bought you a ghost house at Necropolis Union Cemetery, paid with his magic dentures, just sign the gilt-edged invitation.
31477.postEvent: You declined, but each Ghost Festival a fruit basket from the cemetery invites you to move in.

31478.event: Lost to a dwarf in cards, your next minute's memory turned mustard yellow and speech became goose honks.
31478.postEvent: It took two days to recover, but whenever you are angry, a goose honk still slips out of your words.

31479.event: At a circus, you threw crumbs forming gods' war, earned gold, but bread now gives speeches in your mouth.
31479.postEvent: From then on, you only eat potatoes and became the spiritual leader of the anti-bread movement.

31480.event: After buying a mithril ring, all city cats spoke to you, complaining and demanding a union.
31480.postEvent: After you politely declined, cats gather on rainy days holding flags to protest boring food.

31481.event: Sprites kidnapped you as a living statue; after a day and night, you drank dragon-tear wine and heard flowers scream.
31481.postEvent: This ability is maddening in gardens, but on the battlefield, it allows you to predict vine attacks.

31482.event: At dwarves' silent feast, spicy food made tears and snot crystallize into gems; awarded a medal.
31482.postEvent: The gems were appraised as low-quality opals, but the medal grants you free drinks for life at dwarf taverns.

31483.event: Found a miniature azure dragon in bathtub; exiled for personality split, it asked asylum. You offered bathtub and soap.
31483.postEvent: The hatchling established a government-in-exile in the soap dish and even issued stamps. You became its only recognized overseas citizen.

31484.event: Your diary writes itself, detailing dreams that predict trivial futures like bread price hikes or a cat scratching.
31484.postEvent: You considered profiting from it, but the market bored you, so you turned it into a shopping list.

31485.event: Summoned to Shadow Court for stealing magic berries. Penguins presided.
31485.postEvent: After execution, you received a letter of forgiveness from the fruit tree spirit and a berry that was always cold.

31486.event: Your old warhorse composed bad moon poetry; a nightingale dueled it. You hosted a campfire contest to reconcile them.
31486.postEvent: Your horse became a mediocre bard, clanging its horseshoe when tipped a copper coin.

31487.event: At a road fork, you took the path to absolute boredom, walked eight frozen days, yet only three hours passed.
31487.postEvent: You hear phantom thrush calls but gain patience to time enemy attacks.

31488.event: True Sight Lens showed everyone's most embarrassing memory; you saw your teammate in underwear and the lord's bedwetting map.
31488.postEvent: You hid the lens and never used it, but your smirk at authority got you banned from noble banquets.

31489.event: A ring of bone-ash mushrooms formed your birth date, bowed, burst into spores; you sneezed rainbow for three days.
31489.postEvent: A wizard bottled a lingering rainbow and paid you ten magical silver coins for dream potions.

31490.event: A wandering priest knelt, claimed your left eye as Loki's holy symbol, offered three orchards, then stalked and counted each blink after your refusal.
31490.postEvent: You let him sketch your left eye; blinking sometimes revealed lazy people.

31491.event: The Mundane Church begs you to stop adventuring a week because your life's excitement causes miracle overdose, dizzying believers.
31491.postEvent: You took a week off, nothing happened, yet you felt unprecedented peace as their pastor thanked you tearfully.

31492.event: A water elemental gave birth in your bottle, providing fresh temp-controlled water but with occasional mineral baby waste taste.
31492.postEvent: You learned to tolerate the faint rusty taste, after all, it's the price of family warmth.

31493.event: You triggered an arcane trap, making your sentient magenta shadow thumbs-up random passersby.
31493.postEvent: You had a mage purify the shadow, but it returns every full moon to tap dance.

31494.event: A wandering harpist, sheltering under eaves, sang a dragon lullaby, and a scale fell into your swaddle, and he fled.
31494.postEvent: The dragon scale became a pendant that accompanied you, humming faintly in the wind.

31495.event: A magic rat knocked you over; you grabbed its tail, it sprayed toxic ink, turning your left pinky black.
31495.postEvent: This ink-black finger can vaguely sense nearby magic traps, becoming an unconscious life-saving charm for you.

31496.event: At your third birthday, you set a magic quill on fire; it exploded into a nebula and an old mage.
31496.postEvent: Ever since, on every birthday, you inexplicably hiccup for three days, as if under an eternal prank curse.

31497.event: At four, you slept in a snail shell with star-chart patterns; you woke understanding snails' weather talk.
31497.postEvent: This ability is utterly useless, but after every rain, you can hear a cacophony of grumbling in the courtyard.

31498.event: At five, a Truth Candy made your tongue a golden lotus and words into glowing runes.
31498.postEvent: After the sugar effect fades, you still blurt out obscure words unknown even to scholars.

31499.event: At one, your mother took you to a temple; the holy spring boiled, curing your fever; hair turned silver.
31499.postEvent: Your silver hair glows softly under moonlight, often attracting passing elves to stop and gaze.

31500.event: At two and a half, licking blue slime made you semi-transparent for three days, then you lost sweetness.
31500.postEvent: You have since developed a craving for extremely bitter things and turn up your nose at sweets.

31501.event: Sailing at age three, a giant goldfish handed you a pearl with a tiny thunderbird, then sank.
31501.postEvent: That pearl became a family heirloom, humming ceaselessly in its box on every stormy night.

31502.event: At four, a tree spirit wove a crown; you saw earth veins and followed them home.
31502.postEvent: The crown turned to ash as you crossed the threshold, but you still see glowing veins in dreams.

31503.event: On your birth night, seven meteors streaked—a fate sign or vengeful dragons foretelling early death.
31503.postEvent: You paid no attention to their argument, just yawned, and the meteors disappeared.

31504.event: At two, a pixie stole you, fed you dew and pollen for three days; you were found healthy and berry-scented.
31504.postEvent: You have since felt a natural affinity for forests, and mosquitoes never bite you.

31505.event: At three and a half, you found a music box, wound it, and a bone hand pulled you inside forever.
31505.postEvent: Your parents found a parchment saying your child is the Undead Orchestra's vocalist.

31506.event: At four, hiding in a wine barrel, you found a Pirate King's treasure map and traced it on your arm.
31506.postEvent: After washing off the charcoal, a faint tattoo remained under your skin—only visible when heated, pointing to a nonexistent reef.

31507.event: Passing an unattended stall, a glowing pearl shattered into smoke, leaving a star-shaped scar on your palm.
31507.postEvent: Since then, your scar faintly warms under starry skies, answering a star.

31508.event: A drunkard claimed he slew a dragon and gave you a fake scale—a dyed chicken claw.
31508.postEvent: Yet you began having one lucky break after another, even doubting its authenticity.

31509.event: You heard whispers while sleeping, opened the window to a crow reciting your death poem, then it flew away.
31509.postEvent: From then on, all town birds tilted their heads at you, and you grew used to it.

31510.event: You ate a glowing mushroom from a statue's eye and dreamed of chess with a tortoise on a cloud.
31510.postEvent: After waking up, you inexplicably learned a long-lost chess move.

31511.event: Bought dragon stomach stones, ground into soup; it turned purple and numbed taste.
31511.postEvent: Using that soup, you scared off protection money thugs, who now think you're a poison master.

31512.event: A stray cat left dead rats as rent, with a note thanking you for your care.
31512.postEvent: The cat never returned, but you still sense hidden eyes watching from the shadows.

31513.event: Drawn by a flute, found a translucent deer with a phantom moon; touching its antlers revealed dead relatives.
31513.postEvent: After the apparitions faded, the deer also disappeared, and you found a warm moonstone in your arms.

31514.event: Your shadow lagged, moved on its own, then eloped with another, leaving you shadowless.
31514.postEvent: People found you suspicious, but also no one dared to provoke you easily.

31515.event: You wrote in a found diary; a drawing reply began daily chats with a mystery pen pal.
31515.postEvent: One day, the diary ended with "See you tomorrow." Next day, a new door appeared.

31516.event: You drank a potion, grew iron-hard three-foot nails, sharpened them into self-repairing weapons, and sold clippings to live.
31516.postEvent: Your nail clippers became your most precious possession.

31517.event: A fish jumped into your mouth; it thanked you as the River God's son, vanished, leaving a scale mark.
31517.postEvent: The mark allows you to breathe underwater, but you can never eat fish again.

31518.event: A talking tree asked you to read poetry, then gave a golden leaf as three centuries of gratitude.
31518.postEvent: The leaf never withers, and when you touch it, you can hear the song of trees.

31519.event: A strange knight forced a rusty sword on you, declared you dragonslayer, rode off; it hummed like a mosquito.
31519.postEvent: Later, you used this sword to pry open countless treasure chests, never once using it in battle.

31520.event: Your hair became self-aware vines that entangle others; you must water and sing to it daily.
31520.postEvent: The vine hair occasionally bears delicious berries, but also causes you extreme embarrassment in social situations.

31521.event: You get a blood-written love letter, then find a black rose on your pillow daily.
31521.postEvent: You never know who sends the flowers, but strangely, you don't feel afraid.

31522.event: Inadvertently drinking fake holy water, you spoke only Draconic for a week and learned fire magic.
31522.postEvent: After recovery, your voice becomes hoarse, but your spells always carry a low draconic might.

31523.event: You enter an empty church, an organ plays a dirge, candles die, then darkness teleports you to a distant cemetery.
31523.postEvent: You just shiver, unharmed, but from then on, you have an inexplicable wariness of churches.

31524.event: Wearing a ring lets you understand ants and referee their thirty-year empire war.
31524.postEvent: You squat on the ground mediating for an afternoon. As payment, the ants bring a gold coin in human terms.

31525.event: Falling off a cliff, a dandelion seed caught you. You drifted miles and landed on grassland.
31525.postEvent: When you land, you find your pockets stuffed with a kind of healing spores.

31526.event: You buy an antique bronze mirror. At night, an expressionless copy appears, steps out, touches your forehead coldly.
31526.postEvent: The next day, you find the bronze mirror shattered, and a barely noticeable crescent mark on your forehead.

31527.event: You enter a mushroom maze that mocks you. Kicking one makes it move you to the exit.
31527.postEvent: You earn the embarrassing title of 'Mushroom Friend.'

31528.event: You attend a Dead Person's Wedding; ghosts are guests. The groom, your dead relative, insists you take his inheritance.
31528.postEvent: A ghostly goose inheritance lays one golden egg daily that lasts until sunset.

31529.event: A worm-like meteorite hits your head unharmed, then becomes a living book of your future.
31529.postEvent: But every time you open it, you age one year, so you have to lock it in an iron chest.

31530.event: The fox you saved, the forest's embodiment, gave shape-shifting power eroding your life.

31531.event: In a storm, a dragon egg fossil on your doorstep hatches into a transparent-winged dragonet that sees you.
31531.postEvent: It imprints on you as its mother, and now you have to feed it copper ore.

31532.event: A beggar trades a fateful kiss for your hair, becomes a pigeon, and you sense danger.
31532.postEvent: But one lock of your hair remains forever white.

31533.event: You pick up a shiny coin that melts into your palm, turning blood to copper and rusting metal you touch.
31533.postEvent: After three days, the symptom fades, but your right hand retains a permanent copper-green texture.

31534.event: You toss a silver coin into a well, wish no rain, but the town's water turns to milk.
31534.postEvent: You are chased by the whole town with thanks (or beatings), and you still dare not admit your involvement.

31535.event: Reading a forbidden book on becoming a tree made your hair leaf and feet root, immobilizing you for a day.
31535.postEvent: Later, you learn to control it and can briefly photosynthesize, but you must drink a lot of water afterward.

31536.event: You encounter a wandering circus, are invited to bite fireballs, swallow one, and accidentally learn to spit sparks.
31536.postEvent: Though spitting fire gives you a sore throat for three days, children love you.

31537.event: Ignoring a letter's warning, you look at the moon, see an extra eye, and go blind every full moon.
31537.postEvent: During blindness, your hearing and perception become exceptionally acute.

31538.event: You find a haunted shield in a battlefield ruin; it floats and chatters about past glory.
31538.postEvent: The shield occasionally blocks attacks on its own, but its chatter makes stealth impossible.
