31539.event: Found a drift bottle with a note: trapped in time, throw three pebbles.
31539.postEvent: But every time you use this water, a voice counts down your heartbeat in your mind.

31540.event: Your parrot recites a forbidden spell, freezing the room and your tableware into ice.
31540.postEvent: You must board the parrot at the magic academy; it sends an ice feather monthly.

31541.event: You wake in an abandoned hut as a transparent wolf licks your healed wound, whispers of past-life kindness, then fades.
31541.postEvent: A wolf-head tattoo appears on your right shoulder. It emits a faint glow to accelerate healing when you are injured.

31542.event: Winning a pie contest, you get a knife that cuts lies; bread then says it's cake.
31542.postEvent: This knife brings your dining life full of surprises and chaos.

31543.event: You meet the Time Tax Collector demanding a future day. Refusing, he sighs, draws silver light, vanishes.
31543.postEvent: From then on, you no longer dream, but you gain two extra hours of waking time each day.

31544.event: In a mirror room, you touched one and were pulled into a backward-time world. You emerged holding your baby tooth.
31544.postEvent: The baby tooth glows faintly at night, as if reminding you of the lost time.

31545.event: A spark from the campfire brands a star map on your hand that spins and dizzies you.
31545.postEvent: Now, whenever you gaze at the stars, you spot a dark star outside any known constellation.

31546.event: You open a strange angel statue's hands, see your own face, then dream of wings and staring eyes in clouds.
31546.postEvent: When you wake up, you find a white feather beside your pillow.

31547.event: A talking snail claims you're its reincarnated master, leaving healing silver slime as it follows.
31547.postEvent: You reluctantly adopt it. Its slow pace drives you crazy, but its slime has saved your life.

31548.event: Walking alone in rain, raindrops become silver fish that wriggle to vapor, swirling into a brief Milky Way.
31548.postEvent: You are soaked through, but inexplicably in a great mood.

31549.event: Drank Dragon Breath Essence, spewed flames, burned off your eyebrows, and saw a dragon phantom nod at you.
31549.postEvent: Afterwards, whenever you drink alcohol, you burp out small sparks, but your drunken words always endear you to dragons.

31550.event: Stepped into purple puddle that crystallized, trapping you until noon. Sun melted it; your footprints became two crystal flowers.
31550.postEvent: You pick the crystal flowers. They never wither and can purify nearby water sources.

31551.event: You meet a weeping mushroom person missing its hat. You give your handkerchief as a hat; it smiles and offers.
31551.postEvent: You plant the spore, and overnight it grows into a small mushroom house, giving you a temporary shelter.

31552.event: Found a skeleton with a diary; last page asks you to take its pocket watch to the nearest town bakery.
31552.postEvent: You do as asked. The baker, seeing the pocket watch, bursts into tears and gives you free bread for life.

31553.event: Heating foot water with magic stone accidentally opens portal to Fire Plane; fire snake sneezes turning water to lava.
31553.postEvent: You jump back barefoot. The fire snake retreats apologetically, leaving behind a tiny eternal flame.

31554.event: Your portrait changes backgrounds daily and once winks, tossing a real gold coin from the frame.
31554.postEvent: The coin bears the pattern of the desert temple from your portrait's background. It might be a treasure map.

31555.event: You find a cold stone. It cracks, releasing a blue butterfly that circles you thrice and flies away.
31555.postEvent: From then on, you no longer sweat. Even in the hottest summer, you stay cool as spring.

31556.event: A dwarf blacksmith mistakes you for his apprentice, gives you a singing hammer that turns iron to silver.
31556.postEvent: The blacksmith awkwardly takes back the hammer but gives you a ring that identifies metal purity.

31557.event: A silent knight drinks through a straw in his helmet, a hilariously clumsy sight.
31557.postEvent: You stifle laughter until it hurts, then recall the knight's shield—he's a shy, kind soul.

31558.event: A box with a baby's cry holds a cabbage that giggles, then turns silver and flies into your left eye.
31558.postEvent: Afterwards, you can see tiny floating magic particles in the air, but your left eye has turned silver-gray.

31559.event: Climb an ancient giant tree, find a chess game. Make a move; tree glows. Spirit gives eternal leaf.
31559.postEvent: Leaves let you talk to trees, but branches will intentionally brush your head as you pass.

31560.event: In the desert, an upside-down camel howls, making a spring gush; its water reflects your past life's face.
31560.postEvent: You are stunned. The camel has vanished, leaving only a few gold coins in your pocket.

31561.event: Buying an oil lamp, wiping it conjures a bathing phantom dwarf who screams, curses, throws soap, and vanishes.
31561.postEvent: The soap removes all stains, even magical ones, but each use brings distant dwarf grumbles.

31562.event: Fireflies form 'Follow us' and lead you to a temple. They become a light ball that turns into an emblem.
31562.postEvent: The emblem summons fireflies to light the darkness, but each use costs a happy memory.

31563.event: Your sandwich taunts you, you bite it, it smokes, and you gain a three-day no-food buff.
31563.postEvent: But every time you burp, breadcrumbs float out.

31564.event: You find a lake showing another life; touching it, the reflection pulls you under for ten minutes.
31564.postEvent: After surfacing, you find yourself wearing a set of clothing from that identity. You feel lost.

31565.event: You help an old lady retrieve her cat, feel a warm pat, then age backwards a year.
31565.postEvent: You have become younger, but your mental age remains the same. The feeling is very subtle.

31566.event: Swept by purple whirlwind, you land in far flower sea. Stele says 'Here lies the wind's first love.'
31566.postEvent: You pick a flower. It never withers, but it always hums the wind's song softly in your ear.

31567.event: In an abandoned lab, you spill a potion making words real; an apple appears, then a dragon burns your sleeve.
31567.postEvent: The effect lasts only an hour, but you have learned to be careful with your words.

31568.event: You catch an iron fish whose key opens your shadow to a starry sky.
31568.postEvent: You crawl into shadow, grab star iron, but emerge to find the key melted.

31569.event: After eating a glowing mushroom, you see fate threads; plucking one triggers a distant boom.
31569.postEvent: After the hallucination ends, you learn the neighboring town's clock tower collapsed inexplicably at that moment.

31570.event: Dreaming as a falling star in Eldland, you wake to a shard, recalling your first sword at sixteen.
